name: Blueberry Lemon Streusel Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp lemon juice, or 1 lemon, juiced
1 tbsp grated lemon rind, or whole lemon rind
recipeInstructions:
I thought this recipe was really good. The lemon really brings out the flavor of the blueberries.
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Spray an 8-inch square pan with cooking spray.
2. Combine milk and lemon juice in a bowl and set aside for 2 minutes.
3. In another bowl, combine flour, oatmeal, sugar, baking powder, and lemon rind. Stir in the lemon juice mixture and egg white. Gently fold in blueberries. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
4. Sprinkle the oatmeal and nutmeg evenly over the cake. Drizzle with honey.
5. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
